notes: Adds a problem approval gate so handlers send RCA and fix details for approver review instead of closing directly.
Adds problem and change rejection with comments, rework, and resubmit paths for governance training scenarios.
Clarifies problem and change detail pages with next-action guidance and role-specific approval controls.
Allows manager hierarchy visibility for subordinate incident and task follow-up.
Keeps bootstrap admin reset to admin/admin available during POC while preserving normal password policy.
